Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Written Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff JRA Law Partners' motion to enforce written settlement is granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
